# Roadie Labs Race Database

> The definitive gravel race database. 427 races rated on 14 criteria, scored 0-100, and tiered 1-4.
> Last generated: 2026-06-10

## Overview

Roadie Labs is an independent gravel cycling database covering 427 races across North America and beyond. Every race is scored on 14 dimensions (logistics, length, technicality, elevation, climate, altitude, adventure, prestige, race quality, experience, community, field depth, value, expenses) on a 1-5 scale, producing an overall score out of 100 and a tier assignment (T1=elite, T2=strong, T3=solid, T4=developing).

- **Tier 1 (Elite)**: 22 races — score >= 80 or prestige override
- **Tier 2 (Strong)**: 331 races — score >= 60
- **Tier 3 (Solid)**: 73 races — score >= 45
- **Tier 4 (Developing)**: 1 races — score < 45

Disciplines: gravel, MTB, bikepacking.
Regions: Africa, Asia, Eastern Europe, North America, Northern Europe, Oceania, Other, South America, Southern Europe, UK & Ireland, Western Europe.

## Machine-Readable Resources

- [Full LLM context (this database as text)](https://roadielabs.com/llms-full.txt)
- [Race index JSON (427 entries)](https://roadielabs.com/race-index.json)
- [REST API (OpenAPI)](https://roadielabs.com/api/v1/docs)
- [RSS feed](https://roadielabs.com/feed/races.xml)
- [MCP Server (GitHub)](https://github.com/wattgod/gravel-race-automation)
- [Individual race profiles](https://roadielabs.com/race/{slug}/)
- [Markdown profiles](https://roadielabs.com/race/{slug}/index.md)
- [Race training-plan guides](https://roadielabs.com/race/{slug}/training-plan/)
- [Race prep kits](https://roadielabs.com/race/{slug}/prep-kit/)

## Contact

- Website: https://roadielabs.com
- Email: matt@roadielabs.com
